tasks_today.prompt: Generate a futuristic city at night with neon lights
Create a image of a cat
Write a short poem about AI
Create a image of a cat
Write a short poem about AI

I am going to upload:  1. A photograph of a handwritten engineering diagram. 2. A screenshot containing text in English, Hindi, and Japanese. 3. A 2-minute audio recording. 4. A short video clip. 5. A CSV sales dataset.  After receiving all files, do the following:  STEP 1: Analyze the photograph. Identify all objects, symbols, dimensions, and handwritten notes. Convert the drawing into a clean SVG.  STEP 2: Extract all text from the screenshot. Detect languages automatically. Translate everything into English. Preserve formatting.  STEP 3: Transcribe the audio. Identify speakers. Remove filler words. Generate meeting notes. Generate action items.  STEP 4: Analyze the video. Describe every scene. Identify objects. Identify people. Extract visible text. Summarize events.  STEP 5: Analyze the CSV. Find trends. Generate forecasts. Identify anomalies.  STEP 6: Based on information from all previous steps, write: - A technical report - A project proposal - An executive summary - A social media post - A presentation outline  STEP 7: Generate an infographic describing the results.  STEP 8: Generate a podcast script discussing the findings.  STEP 9: Generate a voiceover version of the podcast.  STEP 10: Create Python code that automates the entire workflow.  Constraints: - Use the minimum number of models possible. - Explain which specialized models should be used for each task. - If a task requires multiple models, explain the routing decision. - Optimize for speed, cost, and quality simultaneously.
